    E

    editingEventId - Variable in class com.example.codebase.CreateEventViewModel
    Firestore document ID of the event being edited.
    endDate - Variable in class com.example.codebase.CreateEventViewModel
    Event end date as a yyyy-MM-dd string.
    Entrant - Class in com.example.codebase
    Represents an entrant in the event lottery system.
    Entrant() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.Entrant
     
    EntrantEventDetailActivity - Class in com.example.codebase
    Displays the full details of an event from an entrant's perspective and provides actions to join/leave the waiting list or drop out of an accepted invitation.
    EntrantEventDetailActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.EntrantEventDetailActivity
     
    Event - Class in com.example.codebase
    Domain model representing a lottery event in the Timely system.
    Event() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.Event
     
    EventAdapter - Class in com.example.codebase
    RecyclerView.Adapter for displaying a list of Event objects.
    EventAdapter(List<Event>, EventAdapter.OnEventClickListener) - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.EventAdapter
    Constructs a new EventAdapter.
    EventAdapter.OnEventClickListener - Interface in com.example.codebase
    Listener interface for item-tap events on the event list.
    EventDetailActivity - Class in com.example.codebase
    Event detail screen for the organizer role.
    EventDetailActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.EventDetailActivity
     
    EventDetailsActivity - Class in com.example.codebase
    Displays read-only details for a selected event.
    EventDetailsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.EventDetailsActivity
     
    EventPoster - Class in com.example.codebase
    Represents an event poster image stored in a Base64-encoded format.
    EventPoster() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.EventPoster
    Default no-argument constructor required for Firestore deserialization.
    EventPoster(String) - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.EventPoster
    Constructs an EventPoster with the specified Base64-encoded image string.
    EventRepository - Class in com.example.codebase
    Repository class responsible for loading Event data from Firestore.
    EventRepository() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.EventRepository
     
    EventRepository.EventDetailsCallback - Interface in com.example.codebase
    Callback interface for operations that return a single Event.
    EventRepository.EventsCallback - Interface in com.example.codebase
    Callback interface for operations that return a collection of Event objects.
    EventSchema - Class in com.example.codebase
    Utility class providing Firestore schema normalization helpers for Event documents.
    EventsFragment - Class in com.example.codebase
    A Fragment that displays a browsable list of all active events available to entrants.
    EventsFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.EventsFragment
     
    eventsRef - Variable in class com.example.codebase.AppDatabase
    Reference to the events Firestore collection.
    ExploreEventAdapter - Class in com.example.codebase
    A RecyclerView.Adapter for ExplorePageActivity that displays a list of event invitations to an Entrant and surfaces accept, decline, and detail-view actions to the hosting component.
    ExploreEventAdapter(List<Event>, ExploreEventAdapter.OnInvitationActionListener) - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.ExploreEventAdapter
    Constructs an ExploreEventAdapter with the given invitation list and interaction listener.
    ExploreEventAdapter.OnInvitationActionListener - Interface in com.example.codebase
    Callback interface for delivering invitation interaction events to the hosting
    invalid reference 
    android.app.Activity
    or Fragment.
    ExplorePageActivity - Class in com.example.codebase
    Displays all available events and a summary card for pending lottery invitations.
    ExplorePageActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.ExplorePageActivity
     
    EXTRA_EVENT_ID - Static variable in class com.example.codebase.CancelledEntrantsActivity
    Intent extra key for the Firestore event document ID.
    EXTRA_EVENT_ID - Static variable in class com.example.codebase.EntrantEventDetailActivity
    Intent extra key for the Firestore event document ID.
    EXTRA_EVENT_ID - Static variable in class com.example.codebase.EventDetailActivity
    Intent extra key for the Firestore event document ID.
    EXTRA_EVENT_ID - Static variable in class com.example.codebase.InvitedEntrantsActivity
    Intent extra key for the Firestore event document ID.
    EXTRA_EVENT_TITLE - Static variable in class com.example.codebase.CancelledEntrantsActivity
    Intent extra key for the event display title.
    EXTRA_EVENT_TITLE - Static variable in class com.example.codebase.EventDetailActivity
    Intent extra key for the event title (used for toolbar display).
    EXTRA_EVENT_TITLE - Static variable in class com.example.codebase.InvitedEntrantsActivity
    Intent extra key for the event title displayed in the toolbar.
    EXTRA_FIRST_RUN - Static variable in class com.example.codebase.ProfileSettingsActivity
    Boolean
    invalid reference 
    Intent
    extra that controls the activity's operating mode.
